## Summary

Three UI fixes from QA review:

1. **Landing page nav — "Sign in" link**: Anonymous visitors now see a "Sign in" link in the top-right nav (desktop + mobile), linking to `/login`.

2. **Synthesis status clarity**: When a long-form evaluation completes but narrative synthesis is still generating, the status banner previously said "Diagnostic Report Ready — Synthesis in progress" with confusing text implying the report wasn't ready yet. Now says "Report Ready — Narrative Synthesis loading" with clear messaging: "Your full diagnostic report is ready below — scores, evidence, confidence, and revision recommendations are all final. The Narrative Synthesis section will appear automatically once it finishes generating."

3. **"This manuscript" wording**: `ModeConfirmationBlock` said "This chapter may include testimony-like or sensitive material" — changed to "This manuscript" since this block only appears for full-manuscript evaluations (TESTIMONY/TRANSGRESSIVE detection).

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `components/HeaderNav.jsx` — Sign in link for `authState === "anon"` (desktop + mobile)
- `components/EvaluationPoller.tsx` — interim-complete status label and helper text
- `components/evaluation-poller-display.ts` — matching label and helper text for progress display
- `components/evaluation/ModeConfirmationBlock.tsx` — "This chapter" → "This manuscript"

**Does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation pipeline, scoring, exports, governance docs, voice preservation logic

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- None — text/label changes only, no logic changes.

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI text changes only, no evaluation pipeline logic affected
